creator: sz@bytecamp.net
text:
bytecamp GmbH
bytecamp runs a homogenic FreeBSD environment in an own datacenter located in East Germany near Berlin since 2000. Its developers contribute code to many open source projects. bytecamp is the home for desktopbsd.net and both biggest German BSD communities, bsdforen.de and bsdgroup.de. bytecamp offers professional hosting on a FreeBSD cluster, enterprise email solutions, domain name registration, dedicated and virtual servers.
